products.title: ReviewBooster AI
products.description: Small businesses get reviews on platforms like Google Maps and Yelp but rarely use them effectively. AI scrapes reviews, extracts themes (what customers love, common complaints), auto-generates website testimonials, social posts, email campaigns, and surfaces improvement insights. Subscription tier scales by location count.
products.subject_line: Your reviews say a lot. Let's turn them into revenue.
products.why_works: Reviews already exist. We turn them into testimonials, posts, emails, and insights — fully hands-off.

products.title: MissedCall Monetizer
products.description: Plumbers, salons, restaurants miss calls and lose customers. Track missed calls via call forwarding integration. Instantly send an SMS reply ('Sorry we missed you, book here') and an AI chatbot link. Auto-creates a simple booking page if they don't have one. Clear ROI: recovering lost revenue.
products.subject_line: You missed 14 calls last week. Here's what happened to them.
products.why_works: Each missed call is lost revenue. We turn it into a booking before the customer dials a competitor.

products.title: Local SEO Autopilot
products.description: Local businesses don't understand SEO and don't have time. The autopilot detects businesses with poor SEO (no site, weak content, low rank), auto-generates SEO-optimized sites/pages, publishes blog posts targeting local keywords, and updates GBP with posts. Set and forget — focused purely on local ranking.
products.subject_line: You're #14 for 'plumber near me'. Want to be #2?
before_bullets: No time for content + GBP posts
products.why_works: Most local businesses can't or won't do SEO. We do it on autopilot, anchored to direct local search demand.
